summary: At the Brookline Select Board meeting on January 27, 2026, several topics were discussed, including updates on community engagement efforts, snow clearing responsibilities, and the fiscal year 2027 budget process. The board highlighted the need for improved communication and the importance of clearing fire hydrants and sidewalks after snowstorms [10:30, 96:24]. They also addressed the budget challenges, mentioning a projected gap of approximately $6.5 million and the importance of balancing revenues and expenditures to support the town's financial health [144:26, 161:24]. Additionally, the board discussed a request for information related to a wayfinding system in the Coolidge Corner area, indicating progress in planning for future development [182:31, 188:12].
title: Brookline Select Board Meeting - January 27, 2026
